triggers.result:
You entered the throne hall. 
The king is already sitting in his throne. 
You need to greet him as usual.
The king nodded after hearing your greeting. Then, he instructed you to find a black pearl in the storage room.

It seems that you have taken the pearl that your father wanted. 
It is time to bring it to your father.
You heard the king shouting painfully from the west side of this room.

You saw the king being stabbed right in his heart by an unknown woman. 
The woman wears a black jumpsuit with a turtle logo on her right shoulder. 
Her black eyes viciously stare at you with her hands pointing her blood-stained sword towards you. 
You immediately try to launch an attack to the mysterious woman. 
However, she dodges the attack effortlessly and proceeds to knock you out. 
Before your consciousness is gone, you heard that she says "We will meet again, Huz." 

After a long while, you finally opened your eyes again.

Congrats! You unlocked the your first teleport waypoint. 
After this, you can type "teleport" to go elsewhere.
The guard is wary of you. He immediately try to attack you.

You won the combat against the guard. 
Suddenly, an old man with long white beard comes out. 
Surprisingly, he did not attack you. Instead, tears swelled up in his eyes. 
"You're finally back to the Heaven Realm, Huz". 
You are then transported into a bedroom.

You hear a crying voice from the east side. 
You recognize that it is your sister's voice.

Your sister rejoiced at your arrival. 
You hug her in relief, and she held you just as tightly. 
Crying, you broke the news of the king death and shared what little you knew about the unidentified faction. 
You and your sister then agreed to confront the old man. 
Surprisingly, the door in the west of the corridor is suddenly being unlocked.

Old man Qing took a glance between you and your sister, then let out a sigh. 
He points to a shelf besides him while saying, "Burn this and then you can be free."

All at once, the library was engulfed in a ferocious fire. 
Old Man Qing smiles faintly to use before throwing himself into the blazing flame. 
Suddenly, your uncle appears from the teleport portal. 
He urges you to teleport quickly

Your uncle takes you and your sister to separate room. 
He tells you to rest well and lock the door.

Duke Inqigo is furious after you peek at his notes. 
"What a surprise, little Otuwa. Or should I call you, Huz? 
I am tired of playing family with you. Just hold on a little longer - after Bhu, it is your turn." 
Before he leaves, you manage to get a magic crystal dropped from his pocket without him knowing.

Your sister blocks your path. 
It seems that she already possessed with your uncle's magics. 
With a heavy heart, you have no choice but to fight her.

You put your unconscious sister to the side. 
However, when you want to go out, your sister is awake and starts strangling you. 
Suddenly, the woman assassin (Xuan) rescues you. 
You told her about your uncle plan and both of you rushes to Bhu place. 
Tips: use your teleport skill.
